author: nc1234
content: <@412614104222531604> looks like deathstar is out of sync. I notice `lodestar-ethrex-1`'s ethrex image is for devnet 5. Is this intentional?

author: nc1234
content: Ethrex rejected the payload of slot 960, causing lodestar to be stuck in that slot

author: 0xunclebill
content: We don’t have stateless block production yet if that’s what the issue is
